name: R-10 detector reports clean when before and after props match exactly
command: mkdir -p before after && printf 'export type ButtonProps = { label: string; };\n' > before/Button.tsx && cp before/Button.tsx after/Button.tsx && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/component-api-drift.sh" --before before --after after 2>err.txt && grep -q 'clean' err.txt && echo clean 1>&2
